name: io.github.obseasd/arcade-agent-mcp
description: Let any AI agent trade and launch tokens on Arcade (USDC-native DEX + bonding-curve launchpad on Circle's Arc L1). Non-custodial: returns ready-to-sign Circle contract-call descriptors.

environmentVariables.name: ARCADE_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the Arcade agent API.
